xpAudit.title: XP History & Adjustments
xpAudit.subtitle: Review how XP was earned and record traceable adjustments.
xpAudit.search: Search Discord ID or display name
xpAudit.selectMemberDescription: Choose a member to review XP totals and entries.
xpAudit.noActiveSeason: There is no active season right now.
xpAudit.entriesEmpty: There are no XP entries for these filters.
xpAudit.amountRequired: Enter an amount greater than 0 XP.
xpAudit.amountPrecision: The amount can have at most four decimal places.
xpAudit.seasonUnavailable: Without an active season, the adjustment can only apply to lifetime XP.
xpAudit.reasonHelp: Describe clearly why this adjustment is required.
xpAudit.reasonMinimum: The reason must contain at least 10 characters.
xpAudit.referenceHelp: Optional, for example a ticket, moderation, or case number.
xpAudit.serverCalculation: Level and rank are recalculated by the server.
xpAudit.adjustmentPermanentNotice: The entry is permanently recorded in XP history. It cannot be deleted and can only be corrected through an auditable reversal.
xpAudit.noSelfAdjustPermission: You cannot adjust your own XP unless you are an owner.
xpAudit.noAdjustPermission: You can review history, but do not have permission to adjust XP.
xpAudit.reversalPermanentNotice: The original entry remains intact. Rankoon creates an opposing entry and links both entries in an auditable way.
